title: Disease Map Schema v0

sources.label: Multiple Myeloma Open Research Map v0.1
Multiple Myeloma Roadmap Public Task Queue v0

limitations: Schema validation checks shape, not truth.
Schema validation does not make a disease-map record medical advice.
The schema does not accept patient-specific features, candidate options, or real case data.
The schema does not prove targetability, therapy value, trial availability, eligibility, safety, efficacy, or clinical actionability.
More source-specific extraction rules are needed before map tooling compares coverage across lanes.
